scripts.py:deps: uv venv --python 3.12 .venv && uv pip install --python .venv/bin/python -r requirements-worker.txt
scripts.py:embedding-deps: uv venv --python 3.12 .venv && uv pip install --python .venv/bin/python -r requirements-embedding.txt
scripts.py:check: if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python workers/ingest.py --self-check; else python3 workers/ingest.py --self-check; fi
